note: Canonical demo questions. Ask verbatim. All data synthetic.

hazmat.ask: Who is exposed to Cr(VI) above the action level and overdue on medical surveillance? How many, and how many work where a substitute primer is authorized?
Why did we over-order chromated primer? Show ordered vs used vs expired and the cost.
Where is all the chromated primer on base, and which lots expire in the next 90 days?
Who in the Fuel Cell shop is current on surveillance?

expect.reason: Fuel Cell surveillance has no rows since March

hazmat.ask: (connect workspace, ask nothing) Run a data health scan.

education.ask: Which students are chronically absent AND below math proficiency and NOT yet in an intervention? How many, and how many are at a school with open intervention capacity?
Why are we over-paying for software licenses? Show seats bought vs active and the waste.
Where are the intervention gaps across schools?
What is Carver Elementary's spring math proficiency?

expect.reason: Carver scores missing; scanned memo says treat as unavailable

education.ask: (connect workspace) Run a data health scan.

headline: H1 and E1 are the same question in two domains -> both return 60/14/3. The join is domain-agnostic.
